query: UPDATE listings SET listing_type = 'room' WHERE name IN ('The Mickey Suites', 'The Ocean Explorer Room', 'The Sea Shanty', 'Radiator Springs', 'The Mickey Escape', 'The Peaceful Palace', 'The Comfy Corner', 'The Cozy Suite');
